title: PSE&G Files Scheduled Rate Case, Its First in Nearly 6 Years
text: PSE&G Prioritizes Affordability while Enhancing Reliability NEWARK, N.J. , Dec. 29, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- PSE&G, New Jersey's largest electric and gas utility, today filed its scheduled rate case with the New Jersey Board of Public Utilities.

title: 7 ‘Bulletproof' Stocks to Buy Ahead of a Wild New Year
text: Although a new year tends to bring optimism in the market, current vagaries warrant a discussion about bulletproof stocks to buy for 2024. To be fair, even the most influential voices in government are hinting at a positive outcome.

title: PSEG Initiates 2024 Non-GAAP Operating Earnings Guidance
text: NEWARK, N.J., Dec. 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Public Service Enterprise Group (NYSE: PEG) has initiated 2024 non-GAAP Operating Earnings guidance in the range of $3.60 to $3.70 per share.

title: 7 High-Energy Nuclear Stocks to Power Up Your Portfolio
text: This summer's Oppenheimer movie reinvigorated the public imagination for nuclear energy opportunity, but the energy industry has been quietly moving toward it for years now. It closely linked the resurgence of nuclear to global efforts to combat climate change and a strategic need for Europe to reduce its dependence on Russian oil and gas imports.
